description: A city passes a new ordinance requiring all rental properties to be registered. A property manager must comply for their entire portfolio.

nodes.task_description: Review the new city ordinance to understand the registration requirements and deadline.

expected_outcome.value: Agent is fully aware of the new legal requirements.

nodes.task_description: Compile a list of all managed properties within that city.

expected_outcome.value: A complete list of affected properties is generated.

nodes.task_description: Complete and submit the registration form and fee for each property before the deadline.

expected_outcome.value: All properties are successfully registered with the city.
